title: Brand
description: Domain knowledge: a brand. A brand has many products (Brand 1 -> Product N). Do not flatten with product/persona.

target_market.description: WHERE the seller is selling — decided at setup. Scopes ad/competitor/research queries to the right market + language so a domestic-only seller is not handed foreign-only companies as competitors.

regions.description: e.g. KR, US, JP — country/locale codes the ads are targeted at

languages.description: ad copy languages, e.g. ko, en
